• EN

Umeed Bal Kendra

Guiding Children Towards A Better Tomorrow.

Founder & CEO

A child-focused non-profit organization dedicated to uplifting underprivileged children through education, healthcare, nutrition, and emotional well-being. We believe every child deserves a safe childhood, equal opportunities, and a hopeful future.

Contact

India, Delhi

Gallery

Our Services

Education Support

Free tuition centers, school enrollment drives, and provision of books, uniforms, and supplies for children in slums and rural areas.

Midday Meals & Nutrition

Providing nutritious meals and health supplements to malnourished children.

Healthcare Camps

Regular medical checkups, vaccinations, and emergency health services.

Child Sponsorship Programs

Pairing donors with individual children to support education and livelihood.

Testimonials

Rahul Verma

I’ve been donating for over 2 years now, and the transparency and impact of their work is truly inspiring. It feels good to be part of real change.

Sneha Patel

Volunteering with this NGO has been a life-changing experience. Seeing the children smile, learn, and grow makes every moment worth it.

Ritika Sharma

Their education kits helped many of my students stay in school and continue learning during tough times. I’m grateful for their support.
